data.title: 国际服「Kivotos Halo Festival」小动画
data.summary: [Kivotos Halo Festival Ep. 1] 'Ep. 1: The Gourmet Research Society' is now available! There will be
data.body:
[Kivotos Halo Festival Ep. 1]

'Ep. 1: The Gourmet Research Society' is now available!
There will be a total of 6 episodes in epilogue, so stay tuned!

#BlueArchive

⬇️Official Youtube(HD)⬇️
https://youtu.be/XOV83xtD2jY

[Kivotos Halo Festival Ep. 2]

'Ep. 2: RABBIT Squad' is now available!

'Ep. 5: The Remedial Knights and The Medical Emergency Club' is now available!
Also, please stay tuned for the last episode of Halo Festival Epilogue that will be released tomorrow!
